grep_self_check: grep -rn '_hidden_params|sys.modules.get("litellm.proxy.proxy_server")|app.middleware_stack' airlock/ --include='*.py' | grep -v test  ==> the ONLY code reads are in airlock/litellm_adapter.py. Remaining matches are non-code: transparency.py:196 (a code comment) and fast/ratelimit_headers.py:5 (a docstring) — both pre-existing documentation strings, not reads (inventory marked ratelimit_headers as 'no (doc)').
parity_fixtures: gemini_ai_studio (Vertex vs Gemini split by api_base host)

blockers_encountered.description: Prompt named base 2074fd9, but the real base (prompt files on disk) is 6aeea94 = 2074fd9 + two pack-prompt files. Orchestrator instruction confirmed fast-forward to 6aeea94.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Branched feat/0.5.3-ACL at 6aeea94 (fc67c33 confirmed ancestor of 6aeea94). Prompt + inventory then present in tree.

blockers_encountered.description: [DETECT] During GREEN, test_merge_additional_headers_writes_into_hidden_params failed with KeyError: the _resp helper does 'hidden or {}', so passing an empty hp={} created a fresh dict and the write landed in a different object than the asserted one. Adapter was correct.
blockers_encountered.resolution: [RESOLVE] Fixed the two write-path tests to build SimpleNamespace(_hidden_params=hp) directly so the asserted dict is the write target. All 31 adapter tests pass; no adapter change.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Removed now-unused 'import sys' from health.py, proxy_errors.py, docs.py, models_seam.py, batch/middleware.py, admin/http.py (sys was only used for the proxy-server lookup now owned by the ACL).
Moved the LiteLLM 1.89.0 _hidden_params version-assumption note into the litellm_adapter.py module docstring with the 'ONE file to re-verify on a LiteLLM upgrade' statement (Design Decision 3 / Q4).
models_seam wrap path now passes capability_map as a kwarg (was positional) via install_asgi_middleware; identical result given ModelsCapabilityMiddleware.__init__(self, app, capability_map).
agent_verify_result: pass — targeted 176 passed/0 failed; full no-network suite 2376 passed, 107 skipped, 1 xpassed, 1 failed (tests/test_fathom_init.py::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb — known pre-existing fathom env failure, recorded at 0.5.2 sign-off, unrelated to this pack). ruff check + format clean.
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.3-ACL on branch feat/0.5.3-ACL at 6d1a4496a20b7b62cff584c62b42ad942e57f20d; review, verify byte-parity, merge.
